assumptions.unique_groups_supported: Unique public group names counted from the public map source. Review before publishing.
assumptions.public_support_entries: Rows in the public map source; repeat groups are counted separately here.
assumptions.returning_groups: Unique public group names with more than one entry.
assumptions.scout_districts_reached: Unique Scout district names supplied in Region_report.csv.
assumptions.young_people_reached: Placeholder estimate using one kit per young person. Adjust if your public reporting uses a different assumption.
assumptions.map_counts: Map popups use kit bands, not exact per-district or per-group kit quantities.
